response: Othonna has more species in it compared to Stangeria. The genus Othonna is part of the sunflower family and is native to South Africa, while Stangeria is a genus of cycads endemic to southern Africa. Stangeria contains only one species, *Stangeria eriopus*, whereas Othonna is a larger genus with multiple species, including *Othonna capensis*, which is also native to South Africa.
